2026-06-17T01:46:28.6223088Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6223267Z [36;1m# Write gdb command file.[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6223526Z [36;1m# Uses Python event hooks so that:[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6223910Z [36;1m#   - on a fatal signal  → prints full backtrace and exits gdb with code 1[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6224378Z [36;1m#   - on a clean exit    → exits gdb with the inferior's own exit code[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6224854Z [36;1m# (Plain 'quit' in gdb --batch always exits 0, even after SIGSEGV with nopass.)[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6225280Z [36;1mGDB_CMD_FILE=$(mktemp /tmp/gdb_cmds.XXXXXX)[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6225585Z [36;1mcat > "$GDB_CMD_FILE" << 'GDBEOF'[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6225847Z [36;1mset pagination off[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6226075Z [36;1mset confirm off[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6226471Z [36;1mset print thread-events off[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6226772Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6226965Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6227174Z [36;1m_crash_signal = [None][0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6227410Z [36;1m_inf_exit_code = [0][0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6227647Z [36;1mdef _stop_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6227954Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'stop_signal') and event.stop_signal:[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6228305Z [36;1m        _crash_signal[0] = event.stop_signal[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6228594Z [36;1mdef _exit_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6228923Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'exit_code') and event.exit_code is not None:[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6229287Z [36;1m        _inf_exit_code[0] = event.exit_code[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6229593Z [36;1mgdb.events.stop.connect(_stop_handler)[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6229912Z [36;1mgdb.events.exited.connect(_exit_handler)[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6230187Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6230390Z [36;1mhandle SIGSEGV stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6230681Z [36;1mhandle SIGABRT stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6230949Z [36;1mhandle SIGBUS  stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6231191Z [36;1mrun[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6231372Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6231559Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6231766Z [36;1msig = _crash_signal[0][0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6231993Z [36;1mif sig:[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6232243Z [36;1m    print("\n\n========== GDB CRASH REPORT ==========")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6232760Z [36;1m    print("Signal caught: " + str(sig))[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6233098Z [36;1m    print("--- Crashed thread backtrace (full) ---")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6233420Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("bt full")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6233707Z [36;1m    print("\n--- All threads backtrace ---")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6234028Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("thread apply all bt full")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6234348Z [36;1m    print("=======================================")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6234635Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit 1")[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6234976Z [36;1melse:[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6235187Z [36;1m    code = _inf_exit_code[0] or 0[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6235449Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit %d" % code)[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6235695Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-17T01:46:28.6235891Z [36;1mGDBEOF[0m
